    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>AdPulse — by Srijana M R</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root{--bg:#0a0a0f;--surface:#13131a;--surface2:#1c1c28;--border:#2a2a3d;--accent:#7c3aed;--accent2:#06d6a0;--text:#f0f0f5;--muted:#7a7a9a;--tag-bg:#1e1e30;--success:#06d6a0;--warning:#fbbf24;--danger:#ef4444;--meta-light:#4fa3ff;}
    [data-theme="light"]{--bg:#f4f4f8;--surface:#fff;--surface2:#eeeef5;--border:#d0d0e0;--text:#0a0a1a;--muted:#555570;--tag-bg:#e8e8f5;}
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
    body{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;transition:background .3s,color .3s;}
    body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(124,58,237,.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(124,58,237,.03) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:40px 40px;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;}
    .app{position:relative;z-index:1;}
    nav{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(10,10,15,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:200;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    [data-theme="light"] nav{background:rgba(244,244,248,.94);}
    .logo{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.5px;white-space:nowrap;}
    .logo span{color:var(--accent);}
    .logo sub{font-size:.48rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;vertical-align:middle;margin-left:4px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .nav-center{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
    .nav-tab{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;background:transparent;color:var(--muted);transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;}
    .nav-tab:hover{color:var(--text);border-color:var(--border);}
    .nav-tab.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
    .nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .xp-badge{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.72rem;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;color:var(--accent2);}
    .streak-badge{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.72rem;background:rgba(251,191,36,.1);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.3);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;color:var(--warning);}
    .theme-toggle{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.95rem;}
    .mobile-menu-btn{display:none;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 9px;cursor:pointer;}
    .page{display:none;animation:fadeIn .3s ease;}
    .page.active{display:block;}
    @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    .hero{padding:44px 22px 28px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;align-items:center;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
    .hero-eyebrow{font-size:.68rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .hero-title{font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-1px;}
    .hero-title .grad{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--meta-light),var(--accent));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
    .hero-sub{color:var(--muted);margin-top:10px;line-height:1.7;font-size:.88rem;}
    .hero-creator{margin-top:12px;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .hero-creator span{color:var(--accent2);}
    .hero-cta{margin-top:20px;display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .btn{padding:9px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:700;font-size:.83rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:#6d28d9;transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border);}
    .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
    .btn-sm{padding:6px 13px;font-size:.76rem;}
    .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;}
    .stat-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;padding:16px;text-align:center;}
    .stat-card .num{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);}
    .stat-card .lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .progress-overview{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:18px 22px;max-width:1056px;margin:0 22px 20px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}
    .po-title{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
    .po-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:8px;}
    .po-item{background:var(--surface2);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 10px;}
    .po-name{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
    .po-bar{height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;}
    .po-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));transition:width .5s;}
    .po-pct{font-size:.6rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent2);margin-top:3px;}
    .section-header{padding:20px 22px 10px;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
    .section-title{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;}
    .section-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.8rem;margin-top:3px;}
    .modules-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:0 22px 28px;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
    .module-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .22s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
    .module-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
    .module-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .platform-badge{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:700;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .platform-badge.meta{background:rgba(24,119,242,.15);color:var(--meta-light);}
    .platform-badge.google{background:rgba(234,67,53,.15);color:#ff7b72;}
    .platform-badge.ga{background:rgba(52,168,83,.15);color:#5ddb85;}
    .platform-badge.mixed{background:rgba(124,58,237,.15);color:#a78bfa;}
    .module-title{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .module-desc{font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
    .module-done-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;font-size:.56rem;background:rgba(6,214,160,.15);color:var(--success);border:1px solid rgba(6,214,160,.3);border-radius:9px;padding:2px 6px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .progress-bar{height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin-top:10px;}
    .progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));transition:width .4s;}
    .level-badge{font-size:.58rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;}
    .level-badge.beginner{background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);color:var(--success);}
    .level-badge.intermediate{background:rgba(251,191,36,.1);color:var(--warning);}
    .level-badge.advanced{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:var(--danger);}
    /* LEARN */
    .learn-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr;min-height:calc(100vh - 55px);}
    .sidebar{border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:14px 0;position:sticky;top:55px;height:calc(100vh - 55px);overflow-y:auto;}
    .sidebar-group-label{font-size:.56rem;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono';padding:8px 15px 2px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .sidebar-item{padding:6px 15px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border-left:2px solid transparent;}
    .sidebar-item:hover{color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);}
    .sidebar-item.active{color:var(--text);background:var(--surface2);border-left-color:var(--accent);}
    .sidebar-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
    .sidebar-check{margin-left:auto;font-size:.6rem;color:var(--success);}
    .sidebar-lv{font-size:.53rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .sidebar-lv.B{background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);color:var(--success);}
    .sidebar-lv.I{background:rgba(251,191,36,.1);color:var(--warning);}
    .sidebar-lv.A{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:var(--danger);}
    .content-area{padding:26px 32px;max-width:720px;}
    .lesson-platform{font-size:.63rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:5px;}
    .lesson-title{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.5px;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .lesson-body{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.85;color:var(--text);opacity:.92;}
    .lesson-body h3{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;margin:16px 0 5px;}
    .lesson-body p{margin-bottom:10px;}
    .lesson-body ul{margin:7px 0 11px 18px;}
    .lesson-body li{margin-bottom:5px;font-size:.83rem;}
    .tip-box{background:rgba(6,214,160,.07);border:1px solid rgba(6,214,160,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;margin:11px 0;font-size:.79rem;}
    .tip-box strong{color:var(--accent2);}
    .warn-box{background:rgba(251,191,36,.07);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;margin:11px 0;font-size:.79rem;}
    .warn-box strong{color:var(--warning);}
    .info-box{background:rgba(79,163,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(79,163,255,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;margin:11px 0;font-size:.79rem;}
    .info-box strong{color:var(--meta-light);}
    .code-block{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:11px 13px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.72rem;color:#a0f0d0;margin:10px 0;overflow-x:auto;line-height:1.7;white-space:pre;}
    .lesson-mark-btn{margin-top:16px;padding:7px 18px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--success);color:var(--success);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-size:.76rem;font-weight:700;transition:all .2s;}
    .lesson-mark-btn:hover{background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);}
    .lesson-mark-btn.done{background:rgba(6,214,160,.15);cursor:default;}
    /* YT */
    .yt-section{margin-top:24px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
    .yt-section-title{font-size:.63rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
    .yt-section-title::before{content:'▶';width:16px;height:16px;background:#F00;border-radius:3px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.5rem;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
    .yt-note{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;}
    .yt-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:8px;}
    .yt-card{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;text-decoration:none;display:block;transition:all .2s;}
    .yt-card:hover{border-color:#F00;transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .yt-card-inner{padding:11px;}
    .yt-icon-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:5px;}
    .yt-red-icon{width:20px;height:20px;background:#F00;border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.5rem;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
    .yt-channel-name{font-size:.62rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);}
    .yt-video-title{font-size:.77rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.4;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;}
    .yt-tag{font-size:.55rem;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,0,0,.1);color:#ff7b72;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .yt-open-label{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:5px;}
    .yt-channels-box{background:rgba(255,0,0,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,0,0,.12);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 12px;margin-top:10px;}
    .yt-channels-title{font-size:.62rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:#ff7b72;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .yt-channels-list{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;}
    .yt-channel-pill{padding:3px 9px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .yt-channel-pill:hover{border-color:#F00;color:#ff7b72;}
    /* FLASHCARDS */
    .fc-container{padding:22px;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;}
    .fc-controls{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
    .fc-cat-select{padding:6px 12px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Syne';font-size:.77rem;cursor:pointer;outline:none;}
    .fc-progress-label{font-size:.7rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto;}
    .fc-scene{perspective:1200px;height:260px;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .fc-card-wrap{width:100%;height:100%;position:relative;transform-style:preserve-3d;transition:transform .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);cursor:pointer;}
    .fc-card-wrap.flipped{transform:rotateY(180deg);}
    .fc-face{position:absolute;inset:0;backface-visibility:hidden;border-radius:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:26px;text-align:center;}
    .fc-front{background:var(--surface);border:2px solid var(--border);}
    .fc-back{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(124,58,237,.12),rgba(6,214,160,.06));border:2px solid var(--accent);transform:rotateY(180deg);}
    .fc-label{font-size:.58rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-bottom:9px;}
    .fc-platform-tag{font-size:.56rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .fc-platform-tag.meta{background:rgba(24,119,242,.15);color:var(--meta-light);}
    .fc-platform-tag.google{background:rgba(234,67,53,.15);color:#ff7b72;}
    .fc-platform-tag.ga{background:rgba(52,168,83,.15);color:#5ddb85;}
    .fc-platform-tag.general{background:rgba(124,58,237,.15);color:#a78bfa;}
    .fc-question{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text);}
    .fc-hint{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:9px;}
    .fc-answer{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6;color:var(--text);}
    .fc-example{font-size:.72rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent2);margin-top:9px;padding:7px 11px;background:rgba(6,214,160,.08);border-radius:7px;text-align:left;width:100%;}
    .fc-nav{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .fc-nav-btn{padding:7px 18px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:700;font-size:.8rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .fc-nav-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
    .fc-nav-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;cursor:not-allowed;}
    .fc-counter{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);min-width:75px;text-align:center;}
    .fc-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;}
    .fc-action-btn{padding:7px 17px;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:700;font-size:.77rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .fc-action-btn.know{background:rgba(6,214,160,.15);color:var(--success);border:1px solid rgba(6,214,160,.3);}
    .fc-action-btn.know:hover{background:rgba(6,214,160,.25);}
    .fc-action-btn.review{background:rgba(251,191,36,.12);color:var(--warning);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,.3);}
    .fc-action-btn.review:hover{background:rgba(251,191,36,.22);}
    .fc-action-btn.shuffle{background:var(--surface2);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border);}
    .fc-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:12px;}
    .fc-stat{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;padding:10px;text-align:center;}
    .fc-stat .fcs-num{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;}
    .fc-stat .fcs-lbl{font-size:.6rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
    /* TASKS */
    .tasks-container{padding:22px;max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;}
    .task-filters{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .filter-btn{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-size:.72rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .filter-btn.active,.filter-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(124,58,237,.1);}
    .task-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:17px;margin-bottom:10px;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .task-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .task-card.completed{border-color:rgba(6,214,160,.3);}
    .task-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;}
    .task-title{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;}
    .task-meta{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:5px;}
    .tag{font-size:.58rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:9px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';background:var(--tag-bg);color:var(--muted);}
    .task-desc{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6;}
    .task-steps{margin-top:10px;}
    .task-step{display:flex;gap:7px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.77rem;margin-bottom:5px;color:var(--text);opacity:.88;}
    .step-num{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.58rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent);}
    .task-complete-btn{margin-top:10px;padding:5px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--success);color:var(--success);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s;}
    .task-complete-btn:hover{background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);}
    .task-complete-btn.done{background:rgba(6,214,160,.15);cursor:default;}
    .xp-chip{font-size:.63rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent2);background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;white-space:nowrap;}
    /* SHORTCUTS */
    .shortcuts-container{padding:22px;max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;}
    .shortcuts-tabs{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .sh-tab{padding:6px 15px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:600;font-size:.79rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .sh-tab.meta.active{background:rgba(24,119,242,.15);border-color:#1877F2;color:var(--meta-light);}
    .sh-tab.google.active{background:rgba(234,67,53,.15);border-color:#EA4335;color:#ff7b72;}
    .shortcuts-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:9px;}
    .shortcut-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .shortcut-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .shortcut-keys{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
    .key{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom-width:2px;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text);}
    .key-plus{color:var(--muted);font-size:.63rem;}
    .shortcut-action{font-size:.79rem;font-weight:700;}
    .shortcut-desc{font-size:.69rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
    .shortcut-context{font-size:.58rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--accent);}
    /* QUIZ */
    .quiz-container{padding:26px 22px;max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;}
    .quiz-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:24px;}
    .quiz-progress{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .quiz-num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.71rem;color:var(--muted);}
    .quiz-bar{flex:1;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin:0 11px;}
    .quiz-bar-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;transition:width .4s;}
    .quiz-q{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.5;}
    .quiz-options{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
    .quiz-option{padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);transition:all .18s;background:var(--surface2);}
    .quiz-option:hover:not(.locked){border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text);}
    .quiz-option.correct{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(6,214,160,.1);color:var(--success);}
    .quiz-option.wrong{border-color:var(--danger);background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:var(--danger);}
    .quiz-feedback{margin-top:11px;padding:10px;border-radius:7px;font-size:.79rem;display:none;}
    .quiz-feedback.show{display:block;}
    .quiz-feedback.correct{background:rgba(6,214,160,.07);border:1px solid rgba(6,214,160,.2);color:var(--success);}
    .quiz-feedback.wrong{background:rgba(239,68,68,.07);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#ff7b72;}
    .quiz-next{margin-top:11px;width:100%;padding:9px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:700;font-size:.84rem;}
    .quiz-next:hover{background:#6d28d9;}
    .quiz-result{text-align:center;padding:12px 0;}
    .quiz-score{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);}
    .quiz-score-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.84rem;margin-top:5px;}
    .quiz-restart{margin-top:12px;padding:9px 22px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-weight:700;}
    .quiz-cat-tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .quiz-cat-tab{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne';font-size:.71rem;transition:all .2s;}
    .quiz-cat-tab.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(124,58,237,.1);}
    /* GLOSSARY */
    .glossary-container{padding:22px;max-width:840px;margin:0 auto;}
    .glossary-search{width:100%;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Syne';font-size:.84rem;margin-bottom:16px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .glossary-search:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
    .glossary-item{padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
    .glossary-term{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:3px;}
    .glossary-def{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
    .glossary-platform{font-size:.58rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';margin-top:3px;color:var(--accent);}
    /* LEADERBOARD */
    .lb-container{padding:22px;max-width:660px;margin:0 auto;}
    .lb-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .lb-header{padding:13px 17px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
    .lb-title{font-weight:800;font-size:.93rem;}
    .lb-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:10px 17px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .15s;}
    .lb-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
    .lb-row:hover{background:var(--surface2);}
    .lb-row.me{background:rgba(124,58,237,.08);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
    .lb-rank{font-size:.93rem;width:24px;text-align:center;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    .lb-avatar{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:.78rem;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;}
    .lb-name{flex:1;font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;}
    .lb-xp{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.74rem;color:var(--accent2);}
    .lb-streak{font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.72rem;color:var(--warning);}
    .streak-widget{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .streak-title{font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:.86rem;}
    .streak-days{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .streak-day{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.6rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);}
    .streak-day.done{background:rgba(251,191,36,.15);border-color:var(--warning);color:var(--warning);}
    .streak-day.today{background:var(--warning);color:#000;font-weight:700;}
    /* CERTIFICATE */
    .cert-container{padding:22px;max-width:740px;margin:0 auto;}
    .cert-preview{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a0a1a,#1a0a2e);border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;padding:40px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .cert-preview::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%,rgba(124,58,237,.15),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none;}
    .cert-badge{font-size:2.6rem;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .cert-label{font-size:.64rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .cert-title{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .cert-name{font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:10px;}
    .cert-desc{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;max-width:440px;margin:0 auto 16px;}
    .cert-meta{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:26px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .cert-meta-item .val{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);}
    .cert-meta-item .key{font-size:.6rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
    .cert-locked{opacity:.55;}
    .cert-progress-bar{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;height:5px;margin:12px 0 6px;}
    .cert-progress-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));border-radius:4px;transition:width .7s;}
    /* MOBILE */
    .mobile-nav-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);z-index:300;}
    .mobile-nav-menu{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:220px;height:100%;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);z-index:301;padding:16px;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .3s;}
    .mobile-nav-menu.open{transform:none;}
    .mobile-nav-menu .nav-tab{display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;margin-bottom:4px;padding:8px 12px;}
    footer{text-align:center;padding:18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono';}
    footer span{color:var(--accent2);}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;}
    @media(max-width:768px){
    .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .learn-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .sidebar{display:none;}
    .nav-center{display:none;}
    .mobile-menu-btn{display:flex!important;}
    .content-area{padding:16px 14px;}
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div class="app">
    <div class="mobile-nav-overlay" id="mobileOverlay" onclick="closeMobileNav()"></div>
    <div class="mobile-nav-menu" id="mobileNavMenu">
    <div style="font-weight:800;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:1.1rem;">Ad<span style="color:var(--accent)">Pulse</span></div>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('home');closeMobileNav()">🏠 Home</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('curriculum');closeMobileNav()">📚 Curriculum</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('learn');closeMobileNav()">📖 Lessons</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('flashcards');closeMobileNav()">🃏 Cards</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('tasks');closeMobileNav()">✅ Tasks</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('shortcuts');closeMobileNav()">⌨️ Shortcuts</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('quiz');closeMobileNav()">🧠 Quiz</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('glossary');closeMobileNav()">📖 Glossary</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('leaderboard');closeMobileNav()">🏆 Board</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('certificate');closeMobileNav()">🎓 Cert</button>
    </div>
    <nav>
    <div class="logo">Ad<span>Pulse</span><sub><a href="srijana_portfolio.html" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent2);text-decoration:none;" title="View Srijana's Portfolio">by Srijana M R ↗</a></sub></div>
    <div class="nav-center">
    <button class="nav-tab active" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('curriculum')">Curriculum</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('learn')">Lessons</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('flashcards')">🃏 Cards</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('tasks')">Tasks</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('shortcuts')">Shortcuts</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('quiz')">Quiz</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('glossary')">Glossary</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('leaderboard')">🏆</button>
    <button class="nav-tab" onclick="showPage('certificate')">🎓</button>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-right">
    <div class="streak-badge" id="streakBadge">🔥 0d</div>
    <div class="xp-badge" id="xpBadge">⚡ 0 XP</div>
    <button class="theme-toggle" onclick="toggleTheme()">🌙</button>
    <button class="mobile-menu-btn" onclick="openMobileNav()">☰</button>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- HOME -->
    <div id="page-home" class="page active">
    <div class="hero">
    <div>
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">PERFORMANCE MARKETING TRAINER</div>
    <div class="hero-title">Master <span class="grad">Digital Marketing</span> — Zero to Advanced</div>
    <p class="hero-sub">Full curriculum: Meta Ads, Google Ads & Google Analytics — Basics to Advanced. 40+ lessons, 200+ flashcards, quizzes, tasks, shortcuts.</p>
    <div class="hero-creator">Created by <a href="srijana_portfolio.html" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent2);font-family:'JetBrains Mono';font-size:.72rem;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;">Srijana M R ↗</a> · AdPulse v4.0</div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showPage('curriculum')">View Curriculum →</button>
    <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="showPage('flashcards')">🃏 Flashcards</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-grid">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">40+</div><div class="lbl">LESSONS</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">200+</div><div class="lbl">FLASHCARDS</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">60+</div><div class="lbl">QUIZ QUESTIONS</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">3</div><div class="lbl">PLATFORMS</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="progress-overview" id="progressOverview"></div>
    <div class="section-header"><div class="section-title">Quick Access</div><div class="section-sub">Jump into any module</div></div>
    <div class="modules-grid" id="modulesGrid"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- CURRICULUM -->
    <div id="page-curriculum" class="page">
    <div style="padding:22px;max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 18px"><div class="section-title">Full Curriculum</div><div class="section-sub">Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced across Meta Ads, Google Ads & GA4</div></div>
    <div id="curriculumContent"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- LEARN -->
    <div id="page-learn" class="page">
    <div class="learn-layout">
    <div class="sidebar" id="sidebarEl"></div>
    <div class="content-area" id="lessonContent"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- FLASHCARDS -->
    <div id="page-flashcards" class="page">
    <div class="fc-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 14px"><div class="section-title">🃏 Flashcards</div><div class="section-sub">Click any card to flip · 200+ cards across all topics</div></div>
    <div class="fc-controls">
    <select class="fc-cat-select" id="fcCatSelect" onchange="loadFC()">
    <option value="all">All Topics (200+ cards)</option>
    <option value="meta_basics">Meta Ads — Basics</option>
    <option value="meta_advanced">Meta Ads — Advanced</option>
    <option value="google_basics">Google Ads — Basics</option>
    <option value="google_advanced">Google Ads — Advanced</option>
    <option value="ga_basics">Google Analytics — Basics</option>
    <option value="ga_advanced">Google Analytics — Advanced</option>
    <option value="general">General Digital Marketing</option>
    </select>
    <button class="fc-action-btn shuffle" onclick="shuffleFC()">🔀 Shuffle</button>
    <div class="fc-progress-label" id="fcProgressLabel">Card 1 of 1</div>
    </div>
    <div class="fc-scene" onclick="flipFC()">
    <div class="fc-card-wrap" id="fcCardWrap">
    <div class="fc-face fc-front" id="fcFront"></div>
    <div class="fc-face fc-back" id="fcBack"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fc-nav">
    <button class="fc-nav-btn" id="fcPrev" onclick="prevFC()">← Prev</button>
    <div class="fc-counter" id="fcCounter">1 / 1</div>
    <button class="fc-nav-btn" id="fcNext" onclick="nextFC()">Next →</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fc-actions">
    <button class="fc-action-btn know" onclick="markFC('know')">✓ Got it</button>
    <button class="fc-action-btn review" onclick="markFC('review')">↻ Review again</button>
    </div>
    <div class="fc-stats">
    <div class="fc-stat"><div class="fcs-num" id="fcKnown" style="color:var(--success)">0</div><div class="fcs-lbl">GOT IT</div></div>
    <div class="fc-stat"><div class="fcs-num" id="fcReview" style="color:var(--warning)">0</div><div class="fcs-lbl">REVIEW</div></div>
    <div class="fc-stat"><div class="fcs-num" id="fcRemaining" style="color:var(--muted)">0</div><div class="fcs-lbl">REMAINING</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- TASKS -->
    <div id="page-tasks" class="page">
    <div class="tasks-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">Practical Tasks</div><div class="section-sub">Earn XP by completing hands-on exercises</div></div>
    <div class="task-filters" id="taskFilters"></div>
    <div id="tasksList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- SHORTCUTS -->
    <div id="page-shortcuts" class="page">
    <div class="shortcuts-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">Platform Shortcuts</div></div>
    <div class="shortcuts-tabs">
    <button class="sh-tab meta active" onclick="showSC('meta',this)">Meta Ads Manager</button>
    <button class="sh-tab google" onclick="showSC('google',this)">Google Ads</button>
    </div>
    <div class="shortcuts-grid" id="shortcutsGrid"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- QUIZ -->
    <div id="page-quiz" class="page">
    <div class="quiz-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">Knowledge Quiz</div><div class="section-sub">Earn +20 XP per correct answer</div></div>
    <div class="quiz-cat-tabs" id="quizCatTabs"></div>
    <div class="quiz-card" id="quizCard"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- GLOSSARY -->
    <div id="page-glossary" class="page">
    <div class="glossary-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">Marketing Glossary</div></div>
    <input class="glossary-search" placeholder="Search terms..." oninput="filterGlossary(this.value)"/>
    <div id="glossaryList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- LEADERBOARD -->
    <div id="page-leaderboard" class="page">
    <div class="lb-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">🏆 Leaderboard</div></div>
    <div class="streak-widget"><div class="streak-title">🔥 Your 7-Day Streak</div><div class="streak-days" id="streakDays"></div></div>
    <div class="lb-card" id="leaderboardCard"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- CERTIFICATE -->
    <div id="page-certificate" class="page">
    <div class="cert-container">
    <div class="section-header" style="padding:0 0 12px"><div class="section-title">🎓 Certificate</div></div>
    <div id="certContent"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <footer>AdPulse v4.0 · Built by <a href="srijana_portfolio.html" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent2);text-decoration:none;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';">Srijana M R ↗</a> · Performance Marketing Trainer · 2025</footer>
    </div>
    <script>
    // ═══ STATE ═══
    let xp=parseInt(localStorage.getItem('ap_xp')||'0');
    let completedTasks=new Set(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ap_tasks')||'[]'));
    let completedLessons=new Set(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ap_lessons')||'[]'));
    let streak=parseInt(localStorage.getItem('ap_streak')||'0');
    let lastVisit=localStorage.getItem('ap_lastvisit');
    let currentLesson='dm101';
    let isDark=true;
    let fcCards=[],fcIdx=0,fcFlipped=false,fcKnownSet=new Set(),fcReviewSet=new Set();
    let currentQuizCat='all',shuffledQ=[],currentQ=0,quizScore=0,quizAnswered=false;
    function save(){
    localStorage.setItem('ap_xp',xp);
    localStorage.setItem('ap_tasks',JSON.stringify([...completedTasks]));
    localStorage.setItem('ap_lessons',JSON.stringify([...completedLessons]));
    document.getElementById('xpBadge').textContent='⚡ '+xp+' XP';
    document.getElementById('streakBadge').textContent='🔥 '+streak+'d';
    }
    (function(){
    const today=new Date().toDateString();
    const yesterday=new Date(Date.now()-86400000).toDateString();
    if(lastVisit!==today){streak=lastVisit===yesterday?streak+1:1;localStorage.setItem('ap_lastvisit',today);localStorage.setItem('ap_streak',streak);}
    save();
    })();
    // ═══ CURRICULUM ═══
    const curriculum={
    meta:[
    {level:'beginner',emoji:'🌱',title:'Meta Ads Basics',lessons:[
    {id:'dm101',title:'What is Digital Marketing?',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_intro',title:'Introduction to Meta Ads',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_business',title:'Business Manager Setup',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_campaign',title:'Campaign Objectives & Structure',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_audience_basic',title:'Basic Audience Targeting',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_ad_formats',title:'Ad Formats & Placements',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_budget',title:'Budgets & Scheduling',lv:'B'},
    {id:'meta_pixel',title:'Meta Pixel & Conversion Tracking',lv:'B'},
    ]},
    {level:'intermediate',emoji:'📈',title:'Meta Ads Intermediate',lessons:[
    {id:'meta_custom_audience',title:'Custom & Lookalike Audiences',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_bidding',title:'Bidding Strategies Deep Dive',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_creative',title:'Creative Testing (A/B)',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_retargeting',title:'Retargeting Funnels',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_capi',title:'Conversions API (CAPI)',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_catalog',title:'Catalogue & Dynamic Ads',lv:'I'},
    {id:'meta_lead',title:'Lead Gen & WhatsApp Ads',lv:'I'},
    ]},
    {level:'advanced',emoji:'🚀',title:'Meta Ads Advanced',lessons:[
    {id:'meta_asc',title:'Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns',lv:'A'},
    {id:'meta_attribution',title:'Attribution Windows & Models',lv:'A'},
    {id:'meta_scaling',title:'Scaling Strategies',lv:'A'},
    {id:'meta_audit',title:'Campaign Auditing Framework',lv:'A'},
    {id:'meta_incrementality',title:'Incrementality & Lift Testing',lv:'A'},
    ]},
    ],
    google:[
    {level:'beginner',emoji:'🌱',title:'Google Ads Basics',lessons:[
    {id:'google_intro',title:'How Google Ads Works',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_account',title:'Account & Campaign Structure',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_keywords',title:'Keyword Research Basics',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_matchtypes',title:'Match Types Explained',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_ads_writing',title:'Writing Responsive Search Ads',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_extensions',title:'Ad Extensions & Assets',lv:'B'},
    {id:'google_budget',title:'Budget & Bidding Basics',lv:'B'},
    ]},
    {level:'intermediate',emoji:'📈',title:'Google Ads Intermediate',lessons:[
    {id:'google_qs',title:'Quality Score & Ad Rank',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_smartbidding',title:'Smart Bidding Strategies',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_pmax',title:'Performance Max Deep Dive',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_display',title:'Display & Remarketing',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_shopping',title:'Google Shopping Campaigns',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_negkw',title:'Negative Keywords & Search Terms',lv:'I'},
    {id:'google_audience_google',title:'Audience Targeting & RLSA',lv:'I'},
    ]},
    {level:'advanced',emoji:'🚀',title:'Google Ads Advanced',lessons:[
    {id:'google_enhanced',title:'Enhanced Conversions',lv:'A'},
    {id:'google_attribution',title:'Attribution Models in Google',lv:'A'},
    {id:'google_scripts',title:'Google Ads Scripts Intro',lv:'A'},
    {id:'google_experiments',title:'Campaign Experiments',lv:'A'},
    ]},
    ],
    ga:[
    {level:'beginner',emoji:'🌱',title:'Google Analytics Basics',lessons:[
    {id:'ga_intro',title:'GA4 vs Universal Analytics',lv:'B'},
    {id:'ga_setup',title:'Setting Up GA4 from Scratch',lv:'B'},
    {id:'ga_interface',title:'GA4 Interface & Navigation',lv:'B'},
    {id:'ga_events',title:'Events, Parameters & Key Events',lv:'B'},
    {id:'ga_reports',title:'Standard Reports Overview',lv:'B'},
    {id:'ga_gtm',title:'GA4 with Google Tag Manager',lv:'B'},
    ]},
    {level:'intermediate',emoji:'📈',title:'Google Analytics Intermediate',lessons:[
    {id:'ga_funnels',title:'Funnel & Path Exploration',lv:'I'},
    {id:'ga_segments',title:'Segments & Comparisons',lv:'I'},
    {id:'ga_ecommerce',title:'eCommerce Tracking in GA4',lv:'I'},
    {id:'ga_googleads',title:'GA4 ↔ Google Ads Integration',lv:'I'},
    {id:'ga_audiences',title:'Building Audiences in GA4',lv:'I'},
    ]},
    {level:'advanced',emoji:'🚀',title:'Google Analytics Advanced',lessons:[
    {id:'ga_attribution_ga',title:'Attribution in GA4',lv:'A'},
    {id:'ga_bigquery',title:'GA4 + BigQuery Export',lv:'A'},
    {id:'ga_custom_dimensions',title:'Custom Dimensions & Metrics',lv:'A'},
    {id:'ga_looker',title:'GA4 + Looker Studio Reports',lv:'A'},
    ]},
    ],
    };
    const allLessons=[...curriculum.meta,...curriculum.google,...curriculum.ga].flatMap(g=>g.lessons||[...curriculum.meta,...curriculum.google,...curriculum.ga].flatMap(p=>p.lessons));
    // Recalculate properly
    function getAllLessons(){
    return[...curriculum.meta,...curriculum.google,...curriculum.ga].flatMap(g=>g.lessons);
    }
    // ═══ LESSON CONTENT ═══
    const LC={
    dm101:{platform:'FOUNDATION',title:'What is Digital Marketing?',body:`<h3>Overview</h3><p>Digital marketing is promoting products or services through digital channels — search engines, social media, email, websites and apps. Every rupee is measurable and trackable.</p><h3>Core Channels</h3><ul><li><strong>Paid Search (SEM):</strong> Google Ads — appear when people search</li><li><strong>Paid Social:</strong> Meta Ads — reach people based on who they are</li><li><strong>SEO:</strong> Organic search ranking — free, long-term traffic</li><li><strong>Email Marketing:</strong> Direct communication with customers</li><li><strong>Analytics:</strong> GA4, Meta Insights, Google Ads reports</li></ul><h3>The Marketing Funnel</h3><div class="code-block">AWARENESS → People discover your brand (impressions, reach)
    CONSIDERATION → People research and compare (clicks, engagement)
    CONVERSION → People buy or sign up (conversions, leads)
    RETENTION → People come back (email, retargeting, loyalty)</div><h3>Key Metrics</h3><ul><li><strong>CPC</strong> — Cost Per Click</li><li><strong>CPM</strong> — Cost Per 1,000 Impressions</li><li><strong>CTR</strong> — Clicks ÷ Impressions</li><li><strong>CVR</strong> — Conversion Rate</li><li><strong>CPA</strong> — Cost Per Acquisition</li><li><strong>ROAS</strong> — Revenue ÷ Spend</li></ul><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Performance Marketing</strong> focuses on measurable bottom-of-funnel outcomes — not just impressions or brand awareness.</div>`},
    meta_intro:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Introduction to Meta Ads',body:`<h3>Why Meta?</h3><p>Meta reaches 3+ billion people across Facebook, Instagram, Messenger and Audience Network. Unlike Google (intent-based), Meta is interruption-based — you show ads based on who people are.</p><h3>Meta Ecosystem</h3><ul><li><strong>Facebook:</strong> Feed, Stories, Reels, Marketplace</li><li><strong>Instagram:</strong> Feed, Stories, Reels, Explore, Shopping</li><li><strong>Messenger:</strong> Inbox ads, sponsored messages</li><li><strong>Audience Network:</strong> Third-party apps and websites</li></ul><h3>Account Hierarchy</h3><div class="code-block">Business Manager
    └── Ad Account (billing)
    └── Campaign (objective)
    └── Ad Set (audience + budget + schedule)
    └── Ad (creative)</div><div class="info-box"><strong>ℹ️ Meta vs Google:</strong> Meta = right person (interest targeting). Google = right moment (search intent). Both are essential in a full-funnel strategy.</div>`},
    meta_business:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Business Manager Setup',body:`<h3>What is Business Manager?</h3><p>Meta Business Suite is the central hub for managing ad accounts, pages, pixels and team members. Never run ads from a personal account.</p><h3>Setup Steps</h3><ul><li>Go to business.facebook.com → Create Account</li><li>Add your Facebook Page</li><li>Create an Ad Account under the business</li><li>Add a Pixel in Events Manager</li><li>Add team members with roles (Admin, Advertiser, Analyst)</li><li>Set up payment method</li></ul><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Domain Verification is required</strong> for Aggregated Event Measurement. Brand Safety → Domains → Verify.</div><h3>Roles</h3><div class="code-block">Admin: Full access
    Advertiser: Create and manage ads
    Analyst: View-only reports</div>`},
    meta_campaign:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Campaign Objectives & Structure',body:`<h3>Choosing the Right Objective</h3><p>The campaign objective tells Meta what result to optimize for. Wrong objective = wrong optimization = poor results.</p><div class="code-block">AWARENESS: Reach, Brand Awareness, Video Views
    TRAFFIC: Link Clicks, Landing Page Views
    ENGAGEMENT: Post Engagement, Messaging
    LEADS: Instant Forms, WhatsApp, Calls
    SALES: Conversions, Catalogue Sales</div><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Common Mistake:</strong> Using Traffic objective when your goal is sales. Always use Sales/Conversions objective for purchases or qualified leads.</div><h3>CBO vs ABO</h3><p><strong>CBO:</strong> Budget at campaign level — Meta distributes automatically. Best for scaling.<br><strong>ABO:</strong> Budget per ad set — you control. Best for equal testing.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Rule:</strong> ABO for testing, CBO for scaling.</div>`},
    meta_audience_basic:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Basic Audience Targeting',body:`<h3>3 Audience Types</h3><ul><li><strong>Core Audiences:</strong> Demographics, interests, behaviours</li><li><strong>Custom Audiences:</strong> Your own customer data</li><li><strong>Lookalike Audiences:</strong> People similar to your customers</li></ul><h3>2024 Approach: Broad Targeting</h3><p>Meta's algorithm, with enough conversion data, often outperforms manual interest targeting. Start with just Location + Age range — Meta finds buyers.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Advantage+ Audience:</strong> Meta's AI-powered option. Give soft suggestions (age, location) and let Meta expand beyond them for better results.</div><div class="code-block">Audience Size Guidelines:
    Too Small (&lt;50K): Expensive CPMs, restricts algorithm
    Sweet Spot (500K–5M): Best balance
    Too Large (&gt;20M): Fine with conversion objective + Advantage+</div>`},
    meta_ad_formats:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Ad Formats & Placements',body:`<h3>Ad Formats</h3><ul><li><strong>Single Image:</strong> Simple, fast — great for clear single offers</li><li><strong>Single Video:</strong> Highest reach, best for storytelling. Hook in first 3 sec</li><li><strong>Carousel:</strong> Multiple images/videos — great for products or step-by-step</li><li><strong>Collection:</strong> Mobile full-screen Instant Experience for eCommerce discovery</li><li><strong>Stories/Reels:</strong> Vertical 9:16, immersive, fast-paced</li></ul><h3>Creative Specs</h3><div class="code-block">Feed Image: 1:1 (1080×1080) or 4:5 portrait
    Feed Video: 4:5, max 15-30 sec for best results
    Stories/Reels: 9:16 (1080×1920)
    Carousel: 1:1 per card, 2–10 cards</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Always design for mobile first.</strong> 90%+ of Meta impressions are mobile.</div>`},
    meta_budget:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Budgets & Scheduling',body:`<h3>Daily vs Lifetime Budget</h3><p><strong>Daily:</strong> Approx. this amount per day (±25% variance). Best for ongoing campaigns.<br><strong>Lifetime:</strong> Total for the full campaign period. Best for fixed-date events (sale, launch).</p><h3>Minimum Budgets</h3><div class="code-block">Awareness/Traffic: ₹500–1,000/day
    Conversions: ₹1,000–2,000/day minimum
    Scale: 5–10× your target CPA/day</div><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Learning Phase:</strong> Meta needs ~50 optimization events in 7 days. Too low a budget = "Learning Limited" status = unstable performance.</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Scale Rule:</strong> Increase budget max 20–30% every 3–5 days. Bigger jumps reset learning phase.</div>`},
    meta_pixel:{platform:'META — BEGINNER',title:'Meta Pixel & Conversion Tracking',body:`<h3>What is the Meta Pixel?</h3><p>JavaScript snippet on your website that sends user actions (page views, add to cart, purchases) to Meta's servers. Foundation of Meta performance marketing.</p><div class="code-block">Standard Events:
    PageView, ViewContent, AddToCart,
    InitiateCheckout, Purchase, Lead,
    CompleteRegistration, Contact, Search</div><h3>Setup</h3><ul><li>Events Manager → Connect Data Source → Web</li><li>Install via partner integration (Shopify, WordPress) or manually</li><li>Verify with Meta Pixel Helper Chrome extension</li></ul><h3>Aggregated Event Measurement (AEM)</h3><p>Post-iOS 14 framework. Prioritize up to 8 events per domain. Purchase should always be #1. Domain verification required first.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Event Match Quality:</strong> Check EMQ score in Events Manager. Send email, phone, name, IP with events to score 8–10.</div>`},
    meta_custom_audience:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Custom & Lookalike Audiences',body:`<h3>Custom Audience Sources</h3><ul><li><strong>Website:</strong> All visitors, product viewers, cart abandoners, purchasers</li><li><strong>Customer List:</strong> Upload hashed CSV of emails/phones from CRM</li><li><strong>Video Engagement:</strong> Watched 25%, 50%, 75%, 95% of videos</li><li><strong>Facebook/Instagram:</strong> Page visitors, post engagers, DM senders</li><li><strong>Lead Form:</strong> Openers and submitters</li></ul><h3>Lookalike Strategy</h3><div class="code-block">LAL 1%: Most similar, smallest, highest quality
    LAL 2–3%: Good balance for scaling
    LAL 5–10%: Broadest, lowest similarity</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Best Source:</strong> Purchaser list (1,000+ emails minimum) → 1% LAL. Quality of source determines quality of lookalike.</div>`},
    meta_bidding:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Bidding Strategies Deep Dive',body:`<h3>The 4 Bid Strategies</h3><p><strong>Highest Volume (default):</strong> Spend full budget for max results. No cost control. Best for learning phase.<br><strong>Cost Cap:</strong> Targets your average CPA. Set at 1.3–1.5× your actual target.<br><strong>Bid Cap:</strong> Hard maximum bid per auction. Very restrictive.<br><strong>Minimum ROAS:</strong> Only spends when predicted ROAS exceeds your minimum.</p><div class="code-block">Testing new creative → Highest Volume
    Established CPA goal → Cost Cap (1.3× target)
    Strict margins → Bid Cap
    eCommerce ROAS target → Minimum ROAS (with caution)</div><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Cost Cap ≠ Bid Cap.</strong> Cost cap averages across all auctions. Bid cap limits every single auction — far more restrictive.</div>`},
    meta_creative:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Creative Testing (A/B)',body:`<h3>Creative = The New Targeting</h3><p>With broad targeting, the creative IS the targeting. The right creative finds the right audience — your ad self-selects its viewers.</p><h3>What to Test</h3><ul><li>Hook (first 3 seconds): Question vs statement vs shocking stat</li><li>Format: Video vs image vs carousel</li><li>Angle: Problem-focused vs benefit vs social proof</li><li>CTA: "Shop Now" vs "Learn More" vs "Get Offer"</li></ul><h3>Valid A/B Test Setup</h3><div class="code-block">1. Change ONE variable only
    2. Use Meta's built-in A/B Test tool
    3. Equal budget on both variants
    4. Run minimum 7 days
    5. Need 100+ conversions per variant
    6. Winner = lower CPA at 95%+ confidence</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Fatigue Signals:</strong> Frequency &gt;3.5 in 7 days + CTR dropping + CPM rising = refresh creative now.</div>`},
    meta_retargeting:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Retargeting Funnels',body:`<h3>Segment by Intent Level</h3><div class="code-block">TOFU (Low Intent):
    Source: Video viewers 50%+, page engagers 90d
    Message: Brand story, education, social proof
    MOFU (Medium Intent):
    Source: Website visitors 30d
    Message: Comparison, testimonials, USPs
    BOFU (High Intent):
    Source: Product viewers 7d, cart abandoners 3d
    Message: Offer, urgency, free shipping</div><h3>Critical Exclusions</h3><ul><li>Exclude purchasers from ALL retargeting (unless cross-sell)</li><li>Exclude each higher-intent audience from lower-intent ad sets</li></ul><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Frequency Cap:</strong> Set 2–3 impressions per week in retargeting. High frequency without conversion = wrong message, not more budget.</div>`},
    meta_capi:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Conversions API (CAPI)',body:`<h3>Why CAPI is Essential</h3><p>Browser Pixel tracking is blocked by iOS, ad blockers and Safari ITP. CAPI sends events server-to-server, bypassing all browser restrictions. Recover 10–30% of lost conversion signals.</p><div class="code-block">// Browser Pixel
    fbq('track','Purchase',{value:999},{eventID:'order_456'});
    // Server CAPI - same eventID for deduplication
    event_id: "order_456"
    event_name: "Purchase"</div><h3>Event Match Quality (EMQ)</h3><p>Score 1–10 in Events Manager. Improve by sending: hashed email, phone, name, city, IP, user agent, fbc/fbp cookies.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Quick Start:</strong> Shopify and WooCommerce have native CAPI integrations. Enable them — handles deduplication automatically in 5 minutes.</div>`},
    meta_catalog:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Catalogue & Dynamic Ads',body:`<h3>What is a Meta Catalogue?</h3><p>Structured product database in Commerce Manager powering Dynamic Product Ads — automatically showing users the exact products they viewed or are likely to buy.</p><div class="code-block">Required Fields:
    id, title, description, availability,
    price, link, image_link, brand, condition</div><h3>Dynamic Ad Strategy</h3><ul><li>Product viewers 7d → Same product + similar</li><li>Cart abandoners 3d → Cart items + urgency</li><li>Purchasers 30d → Cross-sell complementary products</li></ul><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Feed Quality:</strong> Out-of-stock items cause delivery errors. Set up daily automated feed refresh and monitor feed health.</div>`},
    meta_lead:{platform:'META — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Lead Gen & WhatsApp Ads',body:`<h3>Instant Form (Lead Gen) Ads</h3><p>Users fill a form without leaving Facebook/Instagram. Pre-fills with profile data. High volume but typically lower quality than landing page leads.</p><h3>Improving Lead Quality</h3><ul><li>Enable "Higher Intent" form type</li><li>Add 1–2 qualifying custom questions</li><li>Include clear expectation of what happens next</li><li>Integrate with CRM via Zapier for instant follow-up</li></ul><div class="code-block">Lead Form Best Practices:
    ✓ 3–5 fields maximum
    ✓ "Higher Intent" toggle ON
    ✓ Auto-response within 5 minutes
    ✓ Thank-you screen with clear next step</div><h3>Click-to-WhatsApp Ads</h3><p>Ad opens WhatsApp chat directly. Very effective in India. Set up a greeting message to auto-qualify. Response speed is critical — aim for under 5 minutes.</p>`},
    meta_asc:{platform:'META — ADVANCED',title:'Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns',body:`<h3>What is ASC?</h3><p>Meta's automated shopping campaign combining prospecting and retargeting into one. Similar to Google's Performance Max. Meta manages audience finding and budget allocation.</p><h3>Key Settings</h3><div class="code-block">Existing Customer Budget Cap: 10–30%
    (limits retargeting spend, forces new customer prospecting)
    Creative: Upload 10+ images + videos
    (Meta tests combinations automatically)
    Audience Inputs (suggestions, not hard targeting):
    - Demographics (age, gender, location)
    - Interests (Meta may override)</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 ASC vs Standard:</strong> Run ASC alongside existing campaigns for 2–4 weeks and compare CPA. ASC typically wins for mature eCommerce accounts with strong pixel data.</div>`},
    meta_attribution:{platform:'META — ADVANCED',title:'Attribution Windows & Models',body:`<h3>Attribution Windows</h3><div class="code-block">7-day click + 1-day view (default)
    7-day click only (more conservative)
    1-day click only (same-day buyers)
    1-day click + 1-day view</div><h3>View-Through Attribution Problem</h3><p>View-through credits conversions to ads that were only seen, not clicked — significantly inflating performance numbers.</p><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Platform Inflation:</strong> Meta-reported ROAS is typically 30–50% higher than true incremental ROAS. Always reconcile with backend/CRM data. Gap &gt;25% = tracking issue.</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Conservative Measurement:</strong> Use 7-day click only for cleaner, intent-driven attribution.</div>`},
    meta_scaling:{platform:'META — ADVANCED',title:'Scaling Strategies',body:`<h3>Vertical Scaling</h3><p>Increase budget on winning campaigns. Max 20–30% every 3–5 days. Duplicate campaign to new budget if you want to move faster.</p><h3>Horizontal Scaling</h3><div class="code-block">New LAL percentages (1% → 2–3% → 5%)
    New audience sources (engagers vs visitors)
    New geographies (metros → tier 2 cities)
    New placements (add Reels to Feed)
    New ad formats (add video to image)</div><h3>Creative Scaling</h3><p>Find winning creatives → produce 3–5 variations (same concept, different hooks/formats) → add to winning ad sets. Creative refresh is the #1 sustainable scaling method.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 80/20 Rule:</strong> 80% budget on proven winners. 20% on testing new audiences, creatives, and offers.</div>`},
    meta_audit:{platform:'META — ADVANCED',title:'Campaign Auditing Framework',body:`<h3>5-Point Weekly Audit</h3><ul><li><strong>1. Learning Phase:</strong> Any ad sets in "Learning Limited"? Consolidate or raise budget.</li><li><strong>2. Frequency:</strong> Any ad set &gt;3.5 frequency in 7 days? Refresh creative.</li><li><strong>3. Audience Overlap:</strong> Overlapping audiences compete internally, raising CPMs. Check overlap tool.</li><li><strong>4. Creative Performance:</strong> High spend + poor CVR = pause or cap.</li><li><strong>5. Attribution Discrepancy:</strong> Meta-reported vs backend. &gt;30% gap = tracking issue.</li></ul><div class="code-block">Weekly KPIs to Check:
    CPM trend (rising = audience fatigue / competition)
    CTR trend (falling = creative fatigue)
    CPA trend (rising = scaling challenge)
    Frequency trend (rising = same people over and over)</div>`},
    meta_incrementality:{platform:'META — ADVANCED',title:'Incrementality & Lift Testing',body:`<h3>What is Incrementality?</h3><p>True causal lift — how many conversions happened BECAUSE of your ads vs what would have occurred organically anyway.</p><h3>Meta Conversion Lift Study</h3><p>Creates a holdout group (ghost PSA ad) vs test group (real ads). After the test, Meta reports: incremental conversions, lift %, cost per incremental conversion, confidence level.</p><h3>Geo-Based Holdout</h3><div class="code-block">1. Split cities: Test (ads) vs Control (no ads)
    2. Run ads in test cities for 4 weeks
    3. Compare conversion rates between groups
    4. Difference = incremental lift from ads
    5. Minimum: 10% of audience in control group</div><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Reality:</strong> True incremental ROAS is often 40–60% of platform-reported ROAS. This is normal — it means your reporting was inflated, not that ads don't work.</div>`},
    google_intro:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'How Google Ads Works',body:`<h3>Search Intent Advertising</h3><p>Google shows ads to people actively searching for what you offer. Ideal for capturing bottom-of-funnel demand — people ready to buy right now.</p><h3>Google Ads Networks</h3><ul><li><strong>Search:</strong> Text ads on Google search results</li><li><strong>Display:</strong> Banner ads on 2M+ websites and apps</li><li><strong>YouTube:</strong> Video ads on YouTube</li><li><strong>Shopping:</strong> Product listing ads with images and prices</li><li><strong>Performance Max:</strong> All networks from one campaign</li></ul><h3>The Auction Formula</h3><div class="code-block">Ad Rank = Max Bid × Quality Score × Expected Extension Impact
    Actual CPC = (Competitor Ad Rank below you ÷ your QS) + ₹0.01</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Key Insight:</strong> QS 8 with ₹50 bid can outrank QS 4 with ₹100 bid — and pay less. Quality beats bidding power.</div>`},
    google_account:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Account & Campaign Structure',body:`<h3>The Hierarchy</h3><div class="code-block">Google Ads Account (billing + access)
    └── Campaign (type, budget, geo, bid strategy)
    └── Ad Group (keyword theme)
    ├── Keywords (3–10 per ad group)
    ├── Responsive Search Ads (3 per ad group)
    └── Ad Extensions/Assets</div><h3>Segmentation Best Practices</h3><div class="code-block">Segment campaigns by:
    ✓ Network (Search vs Display — never mix)
    ✓ Geography (different bids per city/region)
    ✓ Brand vs Non-brand (always separate)
    ✓ Product category (different margins = different CPA)
    ✓ Match type (some prefer separate Exact vs Broad)</div>`},
    google_keywords:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Keyword Research Basics',body:`<h3>Keyword Types</h3><ul><li><strong>Short-tail:</strong> "shoes" — high volume, high competition, low intent</li><li><strong>Long-tail:</strong> "buy red running shoes women size 7" — high intent, lower CPC</li><li><strong>Branded:</strong> Your own brand — always protect with Branded campaign</li><li><strong>Competitor:</strong> Competitor brand names — intercept their searches</li></ul><h3>Research Tools</h3><ul><li><strong>Google Keyword Planner</strong> (free, inside Google Ads)</li><li><strong>Google Search Console</strong> (what you already rank for organically)</li><li><strong>Google Autocomplete</strong> (actual search behaviour)</li></ul><div class="code-block">Search Intent:
    "how to" → Informational → not for conversion ads
    "best X" → Comparative → good for consideration
    "buy X / X price" → Transactional → best for direct response
    "X near me" → Local → Google Local/Shopping</div>`},
    google_matchtypes:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Match Types Explained',body:`<h3>Three Match Types</h3><div class="code-block">Broad Match: running shoes
    → Shows for: sneakers, athletic footwear, jogging gear
    (widest reach — good with Smart Bidding)
    Phrase Match: "running shoes"
    → Shows for: best running shoes, buy running shoes women
    (meaning must be present in query)
    Exact Match: [running shoes]
    → Shows for: running shoes, running shoe (close variants)
    (most restrictive, highest intent)</div><h3>2024 Strategy</h3><p>New accounts: Start with Phrase + Exact. Add Broad Match only after 30+ days of conversion history with Smart Bidding active. Always pair Broad with extensive negative keyword lists.</p><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Broad Match without Smart Bidding</strong> wastes significant budget on irrelevant queries. Only use Broad when Smart Bidding has enough data.</div>`},
    google_ads_writing:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Writing Responsive Search Ads',body:`<h3>RSA Structure</h3><p>15 headlines (30 chars each) + 4 descriptions (90 chars each). Google tests combinations to find the best mix for each user and query.</p><div class="code-block">Headlines — include all angles:
    - Keyword: "Running Shoes India"
    - Benefit: "Free Delivery Above ₹999"
    - USP: "10,000+ 5-Star Reviews"
    - CTA: "Shop Now & Save 30%"
    - Urgency: "Limited Stock — Order Today"
    Descriptions (4):
    - Expand on benefits, include proof, clear CTA</div><h3>Ad Strength</h3><p>Google scores: Poor → Good → Excellent. Aim for "Good" minimum. But Ad Strength ≠ Performance — always judge by actual CTR and CPA.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Pin Wisely:</strong> Pin brand name/core offer to Position 1. Don't over-pin — let Google test most combinations.</div>`},
    google_extensions:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Ad Extensions & Assets',body:`<h3>Why Extensions Matter</h3><p>Extensions increase ad size, improve CTR, and contribute to Ad Rank. Always add every relevant extension — they are free additional real estate.</p><h3>Key Extensions</h3><div class="code-block">Sitelinks: Extra clickable links (Shop Men's, Women's)
    Callouts: USPs (Free Returns, EMI Available)
    Snippets: List of products/services/brands
    Call: Phone number — direct from ad
    Location: Address and map link
    Price: Specific products with prices
    Image: Visual alongside text ads
    Ratings: Auto-generated star ratings</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Minimum Setup:</strong> 4+ Sitelinks, 4+ Callouts, 1 Structured Snippet, Call Extension. These alone improve CTR by 15–30%.</div>`},
    google_budget:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — BEGINNER',title:'Budget & Bidding Basics',body:`<h3>How Budgets Work</h3><p>Daily budget per campaign. Google may spend up to 2× on high-traffic days but averages your daily budget over the month. Max monthly = daily budget × 30.4.</p><h3>Bidding Journey</h3><div class="code-block">Manual CPC:
    You set max CPC per keyword. Best: new accounts.
    Maximize Clicks:
    Most clicks within budget. Best: traffic campaigns.
    Maximize Conversions:
    Most conversions. Best: 15+ conversions/month.
    tCPA (Target CPA):
    Targets your avg cost/conversion. Need 30+/month.
    tROAS (Target ROAS):
    Targets revenue/spend ratio. Need 50+/month.</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Journey:</strong> Manual → Maximize Conversions → tCPA → tROAS. Don't rush to tCPA before having 30+ conversions.</div>`},
    google_qs:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Quality Score & Ad Rank',body:`<h3>QS Components</h3><div class="code-block">Expected CTR (most important):
    Based on historical ad/keyword performance
    Ad Relevance:
    Ad copy matches keyword intent
    Improve: use exact keyword in Headline 1
    Landing Page Experience:
    Relevance, speed, mobile-friendliness
    Improve: match page content to keyword intent</div><h3>QS Impact on CPC</h3><div class="code-block">QS 10: -50% CPC vs QS 5 baseline
    QS 8: -20% CPC
    QS 5: Baseline
    QS 4: +25% CPC
    QS 2: +100% CPC</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 STAG Strategy:</strong> Single Theme Ad Groups with 3–5 closely related keywords. Keeps ad relevance high without SKAG complexity.</div>`},
    google_smartbidding:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Smart Bidding Strategies',body:`<h3>4 Smart Bidding Options</h3><ul><li><strong>Maximize Conversions:</strong> Max conversions within budget. No CPA target. Start here.</li><li><strong>tCPA:</strong> Target average cost per conversion. 30+ conversions/month needed.</li><li><strong>Maximize Conversion Value:</strong> Maximize revenue. For eCommerce.</li><li><strong>tROAS:</strong> Target revenue/spend ratio. 50+ conversions/month needed.</li></ul><h3>Google's Auction-Time Signals</h3><div class="code-block">Device, browser, OS
    Location (city, country)
    Time of day, day of week
    Search query details
    Audience membership (RLSA, In-market)
    Recent search history</div><h3>Seasonality Adjustments</h3><p>For known short-term events (Diwali sale) where CVR spikes, set a Seasonality Adjustment with expected CVR change % and date range. Auto-removes after the event.</p>`},
    google_pmax:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Performance Max Deep Dive',body:`<h3>What is PMax?</h3><p>Single campaign type across ALL Google inventory: Search, Display, YouTube, Discover, Gmail, Maps. Google's ML decides where, when, and to whom.</p><h3>Asset Group Requirements</h3><div class="code-block">Required:
    ✓ 15 images (landscape + square + portrait)
    ✓ 5 logos (square + landscape)
    ✓ 5 short headlines (30 chars)
    ✓ 5 long headlines (90 chars)
    ✓ 5 descriptions
    ✓ 5+ videos (NEVER let Google auto-generate)
    Audience Signals (strong recommendations):
    ✓ Customer Match list (CRM emails)
    ✓ Website visitors (30–180 days)
    ✓ In-market audiences
    ✓ Custom intent keywords</div><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ Brand Protection:</strong> PMax cannibalizes branded search. Always run a separate Branded Search campaign + add your brand as exclusion in PMax.</div>`},
    google_display:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Display & Remarketing',body:`<h3>When to Use Display</h3><ul><li>Retargeting website visitors who didn't convert</li><li>Brand awareness at low CPM</li><li>Reaching customers earlier in the funnel</li></ul><h3>Audience Targeting for Display</h3><div class="code-block">Remarketing: Past website visitors (by recency)
    Customer Match: CRM list upload
    Similar Segments: Google lookalikes
    In-Market: Active researchers in your category
    Custom Intent: People searching specific keywords</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Display Don't:</strong> Never mix Display and Search in the same campaign. Different CVR will distort bidding signals and waste budget.</div>`},
    google_shopping:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Google Shopping Campaigns',body:`<h3>How Shopping Works</h3><p>Google pulls from your Merchant Center feed and creates visual ads. No keywords — Google matches your products to searches based on feed data quality.</p><h3>Setup Steps</h3><div class="code-block">1. Create Google Merchant Center account
    2. Verify + claim your domain
    3. Set up product feed (or use Shopify plugin)
    4. Required: id, title, description, link, image_link,
    availability, price, brand, condition
    5. Link Merchant Center → Google Ads
    6. Create Shopping or PMax campaign</div><h3>Feed Optimization</h3><ul><li><strong>Title:</strong> Brand + key attributes (color, size) + keyword</li><li><strong>Images:</strong> White background, multiple angles</li><li><strong>Price/availability:</strong> Must be accurate (mismatches = suspension)</li></ul>`},
    google_negkw:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Negative Keywords & Search Terms',body:`<h3>Why Negatives are Critical</h3><p>Block irrelevant searches → reduce wasted spend + improve conversion rates simultaneously. One of highest-ROI optimisations available.</p><div class="code-block">Negative Match Types:
    -running shoes (Broad — blocks "cheap running shoes")
    -"running shoes" (Phrase — blocks "buy running shoes online")
    -[running shoes] (Exact — blocks only that exact query)</div><h3>Weekly Search Terms Audit</h3><div class="code-block">Every Monday:
    1. Keywords → Search Terms → Last 30 days
    2. Sort by Cost descending
    3. Add irrelevant queries as negatives
    4. Create Shared Negative Lists for recurring patterns
    Always negative: jobs, free, DIY, how to (unless content)
    competitor brand names (unless targeting)</div>`},
    google_audience_google:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — INTERMEDIATE',title:'Audience Targeting & RLSA',body:`<h3>RLSA — Remarketing for Search</h3><p>Layer remarketing audiences on keyword campaigns. Past visitors searching your keywords convert much higher — bid more aggressively for them.</p><div class="code-block">RLSA Bid Adjustments:
    All visitors (30d): +20%
    Product page viewers (7d): +35%
    Cart abandoners (3d): +50%
    Past purchasers (90d): Exclude OR separate campaign</div><h3>Customer Match in Google</h3><p>Upload CRM data (emails, phones). Google matches to signed-in accounts. Use for: bid adjustments on existing customers, exclusions, or Similar Audience source.</p><h3>In-Market Audiences</h3><p>Google identifies users actively researching purchases. Use Observation mode first to collect data, then apply bid adjustments based on results.</p>`},
    google_enhanced:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — ADVANCED',title:'Enhanced Conversions',body:`<h3>What Are Enhanced Conversions?</h3><p>Sends hashed first-party customer data (email, phone, name, address) alongside conversion tags. Improves measurement accuracy 5–15% by matching conversions to users even without cookies.</p><div class="code-block">Setup via GTM:
    1. Google Ads → Conversions → Your conversion
    2. Enable Enhanced Conversions
    3. GTM: Add "Enhanced Conversions" config
    4. Map fields: email, phone_number, first_name, last_name
    5. SHA-256 hash all PII before sending
    6. Test in Google Ads conversion diagnostics</div><h3>Google Consent Mode v2</h3><p>Required for EU/UK. Signals user consent to Google. Even without cookies, Google uses modelled conversions. Best practice for all sites globally.</p>`},
    google_attribution:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — ADVANCED',title:'Attribution Models in Google',body:`<h3>Available Models</h3><div class="code-block">Last Click: 100% credit to last clicked ad
    First Click: 100% to first interaction
    Linear: Equal credit across all touchpoints
    Time Decay: More credit to recent touchpoints
    Position-Based: 40% first + 40% last + 20% middle
    Data-Driven: ML-based (recommended — 300+ conversions/month)</div><h3>Data-Driven Attribution (DDA)</h3><p>Uses ML to assign credit based on actual contribution. Requires 300 conversions and 3,000 ad clicks in 30 days. Enable in Tools → Conversions → Attribution model.</p><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Impact:</strong> Switching to DDA shifts budget toward upper-funnel keywords that assist conversions. Broad Match keywords often benefit most.</div>`},
    google_scripts:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — ADVANCED',title:'Google Ads Scripts Intro',body:`<h3>What Are Scripts?</h3><p>JavaScript code automating Google Ads tasks — pausing underperforming ads, adjusting bids, sending email alerts, generating reports. Runs directly in your account.</p><h3>Useful Scripts</h3><div class="code-block">1. Budget Pacing Alert
    → Email if campaign over/underspends by 20%
    2. Keyword Performance Report
    → Weekly CPA/ROAS CSV to Google Sheets
    3. Search Term Mining
    → Auto-identifies converting queries to add as keywords
    4. Ad Schedule Optimization
    → Adjusts bids by hour based on historical data</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 Where to Find:</strong> Search "free Google Ads scripts" — Mike Rhodes, Brainlabs and Optmyzr publish excellent free scripts. Add at Tools → Scripts.</div>`},
    google_experiments:{platform:'GOOGLE ADS — ADVANCED',title:'Campaign Experiments',body:`<h3>Google Ads Experiments</h3><p>Controlled A/B tests on campaigns. Split traffic between control and experiment (e.g., 50/50). Test changes without risking main campaign.</p><h3>What to Test</h3><div class="code-block">Great experiment candidates:
    ✓ Bid strategy (Manual CPC → tCPA)
    ✓ Match type (Phrase → Broad)
    ✓ Landing page URL
    ✓ Smart Bidding target (tCPA ₹500 vs ₹400)
    ✓ New RSA headline strategy</div><div class="tip-box"><strong>💡 How to Run:</strong> Campaigns → Drafts &amp; Experiments → Create Draft → Apply Changes → Start Experiment. Set traffic split and duration. Apply winner when statistically significant.</div>`},
    ga_intro:{platform:'GOOGLE ANALYTICS — BEGINNER',title:'GA4 vs Universal Analytics',body:`<h3>Why GA4?</h3><p>Universal Analytics was sunset in July 2023. GA4 is event-based — every user action is an "event." This is more flexible and privacy-compliant than the old session-based model.</p><h3>Key Differences</h3><div class="code-block">Feature UA GA4
    Data model Session-based Event-based
    Bounce Rate Yes Replaced by Engagement Rate
    Goals Yes Key Events
    Views Yes Data Streams instead
    Cross-device Limited Built-in (User-ID + Google Signals)</div><h3>Core Concepts</h3><ul><li><strong>Events:</strong> Every user interaction (page_view, scroll, click, purchase)</li><li><strong>Parameters:</strong> Additional data with events (page_title, value)</li><li><strong>Key Events:</strong> Events marked as important (formerly Conversions)</li></ul>`},
    ga_setup:{platform:'GOOGLE ANALYTICS — BEGINNER',title:'Setting Up GA4 from Scratch',body:`<h3>Step-by-Step Setup</h3><div class="code-block">1. analytics.google.com → Create Account
    2. Create Property → GA4
    3. Add Data Stream → Web → Enter URL
    4. Install via:
    a) Google Tag Manager (recommended)
    b) Direct snippet on website
    c) CMS plugin (WordPress, Shopify)
    5. Verify data in Realtime → Overview</div><h3>Essential Configuration (Do on Day 1)</h3><ul><li><strong>Data Retention:</strong> Change to 14 months (default is 2 months!)</li><li><strong>Google Signals:</strong> Enable for cross-device tracking</li><li><strong>Link Google Ads</strong> account</li><li><strong>Link Google Search Console</strong></li><li><strong>Mark Key Events</strong> (conversions)</li><li><strong>Internal traffic filter:</strong> Exclude your own visits</li></ul><div class="warn-box"><strong>⚠️ CRITICAL:</strong> Change Data Retention to 14 months IMMEDIATELY. You cannot retroactively recover data.</div>`},
    ga_interface:{platform:'GOOGLE ANALYTICS — BEGINNER',title:'GA4 Interface & Navigation',body:`<h3>Left Navigation</h3><div class="code-block">Home: Personalised dashboard + anomalies
    Reports: Pre-built reports (Acquisition, Engagement, etc.)
    Explore: Custom analysis — Funnels, Paths, Segments
    Advertising: Attribution + Google Ads integration
